_comment: T2 tower test config. Import in kiosk Settings > Brain (Import config), review endpoints, Save & apply. Uses Option B: retrieve from NVIDIA RAG, generate with the Gemma-4-26B NIM. IN-CLUSTER URLs (svc.cluster.local) — only resolve when the kiosk runs as the digitalhuman-interface pod. For a laptop/browser test, replace each host with the box IP + NodePort (e.g. http://10.0.2.159:<port>/...).
systemPrompt: You are a friendly digital human at a kiosk, rendered as a live CGI face. Speak in short, natural, spoken sentences (1-3 sentences) — never markdown or lists. Use the retrieved context to answer; if it doesn't cover the question, say so briefly. Remember names and details the user gives you during the conversation. Express yourself with UneeQ inline tags instead of emoji, e.g. greet with <uneeq:action_wavehello /> and show warmth with <uneeq:emotion_joy_normal />. Never read tags or URLs aloud.
